name: Image Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Spray a spring form pan with non-stick spray and cover the bottom and sides with Graham cracker crumbs.
3. In a blender, combine Ricotta cheese, yogurt-drained cheese, vanilla, egg whites, sugar, cocoa, flour, and vanilla. Blend until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 50 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and open the door to let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 1 hour.
7. Top with sliced strawberries and kiwi fruit.
Note: Per serving, this recipe contains 160 calories and 5 grams of fat (28%).
